introSection: Wing Coaster is a steel winged roller coaster located at Colourful Yunnan Paradise in Jinning, Kunming, Yunnan, China. It opened with the park on 5 July 2018.
fullText: Wing Coaster is a steel winged roller coaster located at Colourful Yunnan Paradise in Jinning, Kunming, Yunnan, China. It opened with the park on 5 July 2018.
